Perfect for lovers of fantasy worlds, cottagecore style, or handmade line art.  ✏️ Original artwork by Rendy Sketch Studio 🖼️ Available as digital art print or custom ink commission on Etsy.

title: Mediterranean Villa Architecture ✨ Warm Spanish Style Home Architecture Inspiration
description: Stunning Mediterranean villa architecture featuring warm stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, arched wooden doors, and elegant wrought iron balcony details. The glowing evening lighting, flowering vines, and lush landscaping create a timeless Spanish-inspired architecture style that feels both romantic and luxurious.  This type of Mediterranean architecture is known for its natural textures, warm tones, and indoor-outdoor living feel. Perfect inspiration for Mediterranean house architecture, Spanish revival homes, luxury villa exterior architecture, and timeless courtyard design ideas. Save this for architecture inspiration and elegant Mediterranean home design 🌿
